name: Version History
description: Document revision timeline with version preview, diff view, and restore functionality. Shows auto-saves and named checkpoints.

modal.description: Full-screen history viewer with preview pane

slots.diff-toggle: Switch between content and diff view

compact.description: Condensed dropdown version selector with current version label and version list menu

slots.trigger: Current version display with dropdown arrow

slots.timeline: Chronological version list grouped by date

visual_brief: Sidebar or modal panel showing a chronological list of document versions grouped by date. Each version entry shows a timestamp, an auto-save or named-checkpoint label, the author avatar and name, and a brief summary of changes. Selecting a version shows a preview of the document at that point. A compare toggle enables diff view between the selected version and the current or another version. A 'Restore' button allows reverting to the selected version with a confirmation dialog. The sidebar preset renders as a right-side panel. The modal preset opens as a centered modal. The compact preset shows a condensed timeline with fewer details.

responsive.mobile: Version history opens as a full-screen overlay. Timeline entries are compact. Preview replaces the timeline view (back button to return). Restore button at the bottom.
responsive.tablet: Sidebar at 320px width with timeline and inline preview. Compare mode uses a bottom sheet.
responsive.desktop: Sidebar with timeline, adjacent preview panel, and inline diff view. Full author details and change summaries visible.
